title: Ulta Beauty Hits New Thresholds
text: Ulta Beauty Inc. ( ULTA , Financial) is a prominent American beauty retailer that had 1,355 stores, totaling 14.2 million square feet, as of the end of its fiscal year of 2022 (which ended on Jan. 28, 2023). In its 10-K for fiscal 2022, it called itself the "largest American beauty retailer, with fiscal 2022 revenue of over $10 billion and net income of more than $1 billion.
